summary: Ukraine's interceptor drone tactics are being recognized by Russian sources as a key element of its short-range air defense, particularly against Geran drones, with mobile fire groups and interceptor drones seen as the most promising approach. On the ground, Lasar’s Group from the National Guard of Ukraine successfully repelled enemy mechanized assaults in the Novopavlivka and Dobropillia directions, destroying tanks with support from SOF and neighboring units. Meanwhile, the Rubikon Center reported 88 strikes on Ukrainian positions in the Krasny Liman direction, including FPV air defense operations against Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs. Separately, Ukrainian forces destroyed a Polish AHS Krab self-propelled howitzer in Kharkiv using an optical fiber FPV drone, highlighting the continued tactical use of FPV drones in precision strikes.
